name: Scaffold AI
description: Scaffolds AI agent and skill assets (Claude, Copilot) into the workspace. Works at container create time and skips subsequent runs when content has not changed.

tools.description: Comma-separated list of tools to scaffold. Supported values: claude, copilot. Default: claude only.

createFileMCP.description: Copy shared .mcp.json template to workspace root. Skipped if already exists. Serves Claude, VS Code, and Copilot.

createFileHooks.description: Deploy and manage hooks files for active tools. Always overwritten on scaffold runs. Claude hooks merged into .claude/settings.json; Copilot hooks written to .github/hooks/hooks.json.

createFileSetting.description: Copy settings templates to workspace for AI models selected. Skipped if already exist.

updateGitignore.description: Add scaffold-managed paths to .gitignore, wrapped between # [START] Scaffold AI and # [END] Scaffold AI markers. Block is updated on every run.

installDefaults.description: Install bundled default agents and skills from scaffold-ai. Set to false to use only contentRepo content.

installRtk.description: Install RTK (Rust Token Killer) and register its Claude Code PreToolUse hook in the scaffolded hooks template. Bash commands are transparently rewritten to token-compressed rtk equivalents (60-90% savings).

installHeadroom.description: Install the Headroom CLI (Python, via uv) for request-level context compression. Installed by default but NOT a hook and NOT auto-active: activate per-session with `headroom wrap claude`. RTK stays the active input-side layer; only `headroom wrap` stacks the two.

installWikictl.description: Install wikictl, a file-based memory layer for AI agents (CLI + MCP server + wikictl-* skills). Off by default. When true, the vendored wikictl package is installed via `uv tool install` and a gated wikictl entry is added to the scaffolded .mcp.json. Requires uv.

contentRepo.description: GitHub repo URL providing additional agents/skills (e.g. https://github.com/user/my-ai-content). Merged on top of defaults. Requires GITHUB_TOKEN secret for private repos.

contentRepoRef.description: Branch or tag of the content repo to use.
